creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to ben.lavery@hashbang0.com from comment #0)

Hi Ben,

I'll transfer the attachment to bug 240386 and close this PR then as duplicate.

It's not needed to open a new PR when there's a newer release is out. In that case the workflow will be:

- Attach a patch for the newer release in the existing PR (and set the "maintainer approval" flag to "+" on it)
- Mark the old patch as obsolete
- Change the subject of PR to reflect the new changes

*** This bug has been marked as a duplicate of bug 240386 ***
